allow: Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('C:/BL4/BL4_AIO_Web/master_search/db/universal_parts_db.json','utf8'\)\); const keys = Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('Top-level keys:', keys.slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('Is array:', Array.isArray\(d\)\); if \(d.rows\) console.log\('First row:', JSON.stringify\(d.rows[0], null, 2\).slice\(0,400\)\);")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3001/api/parts/data" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Parts returned:', d.length\); const cats={}; d.forEach\(p=>{const c=p.category||'none'; cats[c]=\(cats[c]||0\)+1;}\); Object.entries\(cats\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(' ',k+':',v\)\);")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/accessories/enhancement/builder-data" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mfg=d.get\('manufacturers',{}\); atlas=mfg.get\('Atlas',{}\); perks=atlas.get\('perks',[]\); print\(json.dumps\(perks[:2], indent=2\)\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "API not responding or data format different")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3001/api/accessories/enhancement/builder-data" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mfg=d.get\('manufacturers',{}\); atlas=mfg.get\('Atlas',{}\); perks=atlas.get\('perks',[]\); print\(json.dumps\(perks[:2], indent=2\)\)")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3001/api/accessories/enhancement/builder-data" 2>&1 | node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const perks=j.manufacturers?.Atlas?.perks?.slice\(0,2\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(perks, null, 2\)\);}\)")
